Architected a multimodal backend pipeline using Whisper and GPT-4o on Azure OpenAI

resume_data.summary: Ayushman Chakraborty is a 3rd-year B.Tech Computer Science student with production experience in delivering latency reduction, output consistency, and analyst workload reduction on an Azure OpenAI LLM pipeline. He has shipped two production systems, including a containerized RAG microservice and a full stack AI analytics platform. He has expertise in software engineering, AI, and machine learning, with proficiency in languages such as Python, SQL, and JavaScript.
